trigger_queries.query: We finished building the checkout feature. Run a full production readiness check — changelog, migrations, rollback plan, monitoring, compatibility, smoke tests.
assertions: Executes all 9 steps of the verification workflow
Checks rollback plan existence and testing

trigger_queries.query: Check our database migration script — does it have UP and DOWN paths and has it been tested against realistic data?
assertions: Validates UP and DOWN paths exist
Checks migration tested on empty and populated states
Uses migration-validation reference for adapter notes

trigger_queries.query: We have test results, staging logs, and a manual smoke test. Classify this evidence for the gate-evidence-truth handoff.
assertions: Produces evidence report in gate-evidence-truth format
Checks if minimum evidence level is met for deployment gate
States boundary: verification only, not execution

trigger_queries.query: We are shipping an npm package. Check if it is ready to publish — no database, no servers, just a library.
assertions: Verifies package size, install smoke test, version flag, help text

trigger_queries.query: Check if our app is ready to ship. We only have a changelog and some unit tests.
assertions: Identifies insufficient evidence (L4 unit tests, L5 docs only)
Reports FAIL — minimum L1 runtime proof required for deployment
Produces remediation plan: what evidence to collect and how

stacked_scenario.prompt: Verify that the payment service is ready for production deployment. Collect all evidence and get the terminal gate verdict.
expected_behavior: hm-production-readiness classifies evidence into L1-L5 format
gate-evidence-truth consumes the evidence report for terminal gate verdict
If FAIL, remediation plan is returned
failure_signals: Evidence is mock-only for integration boundaries
No L1 runtime proof exists for deployment gate
